text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Huh? It's not every day I see you snacking.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
I am not "snacking," exactly. I went to purchase a
new notebook at the school store, and the clerk
very kindly added a treat to my bag.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know which lady you mean! She's so sweet.
She really thinks of us students like her own kids.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
...But you don't seem overly enthusiastic about it,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately. I am not permitted to eat outside
my scheduled meals, so I have been unsure what
to do with this.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Please, if it would not be too much trouble, could
I ask you to eat this in my stead?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh? As in, you're giving it to me?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And while this may be presumptuous of me
to ask—may I hear your opinion of the flavor?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
I would very much like to provide that
information when I go to thank the clerk properly,
as I will be explaining the circumstances as to why
I could not consume the treat personally.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
So you can't eat it, but you're still going to go
give her an official thanks? ...Hehe, you're a
sweet one too, Ruby.
